computerReply: Autopsy files are restricted to active medical personnel only. Access denied.
situationalContext: Doctor Crusher, no longer Chief Medical Officer, attempts to access restricted medical logs from her office.
userQuery: Computer, access ship's medical logs and download current autopsy files.

computerReply: External temperature zero point eight million Kelvins and rising.
situationalContext: Doctor Crusher, piloting a shuttle into the star Vaytan's corona, instructs the Computer to monitor the external temperature.

computerReply: External temperature one point nine million Kelvins.
situationalContext: As Doctor Crusher's shuttle approaches the star's corona, the Computer provides an updated external temperature reading based on her previous instruction.

computerReply: Metaphasic shield holding. All systems within normal operating parameters.
situationalContext: With her shuttle fully engulfed in the star's corona, Doctor Crusher requests an update on the metaphasic shield's status.
